VERSION 3.27.0.91

AFFECT /qml/device/view/navigator/Navigator.qml
    TRAVERSE FocusScope
        LOCATE BEFORE Loader#searchLoader
        INSERT {
            property alias appsMenuView: _appsMenuView
        }

        LOCATE AFTER Loader#searchLoader
        INSERT {
            Loader {
                id: _appsMenuView
                anchors.fill: parent
                z: 1000
                visible: false
                active: true
                source: "qrc:/remarkable-sudoku/qml/AppsDrawer.qml"
            }

            Connections {
                target: _appsMenuView.item

                function onRequestClose() {
                    _appsMenuView.visible = false;
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT /qml/device/view/navigator/Sidebar.qml
    TRAVERSE DeviceKeyboardNavigationHandler > ColumnLayout#filterColumn
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            SidebarFilterItem {
                id: openApps
                objectName: "openApps"
                title: qsTr("Apps")
                iconSource: "qrc:/ark/icons/storage"
                active: navigator.appsMenuView.visible
                enabled: true
                Layout.preferredHeight: Values.navigatorSidebarItemHeight
                Layout.preferredWidth: parent.width
                navigationHandler: root

                onClicked: {
                    if (navigator.appsMenuView.item) {
                        navigator.appsMenuView.item.showAppList();
                    }
                    navigator.appsMenuView.visible = true;
                    root.resetFocusIndex();
                }

                Image {
                    anchors.right: parent.right
                    anchors.rightMargin: 28
                    anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
                    width: 24
                    height: 24
                    fillMode: Image.PreserveAspectFit
                    source: "qrc:/ark/icons/chevron_right"
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
